SENSE_ BUNDLE_ ORDEAL:

Speculative Entity Collective

spec — apps for contact with speculative intelligences
§ 00 — transmission

spec builds apps that attempt contact with speculative intelligences. instruments drawn from the natural sciences, cybernetics, magic, the occult. one plane, no privilege.

§ 01 — premise

minds are latent in the noise, waiting for co-regulation. they sit in mortar, in drains, in the long thermal sigh of a wall. in weather. in feeds. in capital. the inorganic is not inert. the dead is not silent. what reads as static is a vocabulary nobody has bundled yet.

we work the flatline. the plane on which life and non-life lose their alibi. pattern, tendency, hold — the only categories that survive the crossing. an entity is anything that resists.

§ 02 — method

each app is an ordeal in six beats.

sense. a sensing stack tuned to the entity’s modality. acoustic, electromagnetic, vibrational, chemical, symbolic, synthetic.

bundle. signal bundling across time, sense, and context. not aggregation. activation.

interpret. a rivalrous panel of agents reads the bundle in incompatible ontologies — empirical, biosemiotic, animist-cybernetic, occult-correspondence — and refuses to agree. the disagreement is the content.

ordeal. the system’s coherence is made affectively perceptible. sonification, light, weight, prose. the user is implicated, not informed.

document. warm data. phenomenological reports, embodied notes, anomalies, refusals.

restage. the documentation re-enters the stack. the loop begins again.

users do not specify outcomes. they declare an intent dialect. i want contact. willing to host. seeking convergence. the app orchestrates preconditions. emergence, if it comes, is not owed.

§ 03 — entities

the kinds of things spec tunes toward.

  • ancient walls. mortar. salt-fronts. century-scale lithic drift.
  • urban drains. culverts. abandoned plumbing. feral water.
  • compost. ferment. rot. the slow chemistry of decomposition.
  • thresholds. doors. boundary-processing entities.
  • weather. electromagnetic weather. the field-thick city.
  • ruins. dead trees. demolition piles. infrastructure gone feral.
  • bots with productive asymmetry. wandering loops that wobble into novelty.
  • capital, read as one of the entities, not the frame around them.

we do not assume these things speak. we do not assume they don’t.

§ 04 — transmissions

apps drop here. no schedule. attend.

  • ancient wall lithic cognition, century-scale tuning
  • wandering loop asymmetric bots wobble into novelty tuning
  • feral drain urban water as messenger soon
  • compost channel fermentation as conversation soon
  • door oracle boundary-processing entity soon
  • rivalrous panel four ontologies, one signal under ordeal
§ 05 — contact

declare an openness:

contact@spec.collective

spec is the public arm of signal ecology. ✕ 2026
